prompt: SUBJECT: wide hand-torn ribbon noodles in warm curry-turmeric tones lifted with wooden chopsticks above a white ceramic bowl, ribbons irregular and glossy, flecks of fresh green bell pepper and cilantro, seasoned meat in natural browns, gentle pale steam; no hands or people (match the attached photo of the dish). STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's food illustration - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE subject including chopstick tips and steam must sit fully inside the frame with a wide empty margin of at least 15 percent of the canvas on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
